name: Marcus Delgado
message: We got hammered by the hail two weeks ago, I think it was the May 28th storm. Half my street already has new roofs going up and two neighbors used a company that I didnt love. Roof is about 9 years old. Havent filed a claim yet, didnt want to until somebody who knows what theyre doing looks at it. Were in Prosper 75078. Can someone come out this week?

name: Greg P.
message: Just need a ballpark number to replace a roof on a 2400 sq ft house. Getting a few quotes. What's your per square price? Don't really need anyone to come out, just want the number so I can compare. Thanks

name: Brittany Cole
message: Hi, I have a listing in Mansfield that needs a roof cert before closing next Friday. Can you get out there this week and do an inspection with a written report? Address is off Heritage Pkwy. Need it fast, we're under contract.

name: Sandra Whitfield
message: [10:42 PM] Water is coming through my ceiling in the upstairs bedroom RIGHT NOW. It's dripping into a bucket and the drywall is sagging. The wind earlier ripped something off the roof I think. I'm in Allen near Watters Creek. Please I don't know what to do, is anyone available tonight??

name: Tom Nguyen
message: Noticed a couple shingles came off in the last windstorm, they're laying in my backyard. No leaks that I can tell. Just want them put back / replaced. Probably a quick job. How much would something like that run? House is in Plano 75025.
